overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a woman carrying a child through a golden wheat field at sunset. The character walks past a farmhouse and tractor before the camera orbits around to reveal a dramatic snow-capped mountain backdrop.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall golden wheat grass while carrying a small child, approaching a white two-story farmhouse

entered.detail: two-story wooden farmhouse with porch and dark roof
old abandoned tractor sitting in the wheat field
tall golden wheat grass swaying in the wind
wire fence with wooden posts running along the field boundary
leafless tree standing near the farmhouse

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a third-person view following a woman carrying a child through a vast golden wheat field at sunset. A white farmhouse and rusted tractor sit ahead in the distance, while a wire fence lines the left side of the field.

scene_state.functional_zone: wheat field along fence line with valley vista

events.description: passing the rusted tractor and white farmhouse, transitioning to open field along the fence line
snow-capped mountain peak becomes visible in the distance as the view opens up to the valley

agents.ego_description: walking along the fence line with the valley view opening up, the child still in her arms

entered.detail: large mountain with snow-covered peak visible in the distance
dense evergreen forest covering the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character passes the tractor and farmhouse, continuing along the fence line as the landscape opens up to reveal a sweeping valley view. A snow-capped mountain and pine forest become visible on the left as the sun sets.

scene_state.functional_zone: wheat field with dramatic mountain backdrop

events.description: camera begins orbiting clockwise around the character, transitioning from rear view to front view

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk as the camera rotates around her, revealing her face and the child she carries

entered.detail: the farmhouse reappears on the left side as the camera rotates

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its orbit around the character, now showing her front profile against the stunning backdrop of the snow-capped mountain. The farmhouse reappears on the left as she continues walking through the wheat field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a golden wheat field that gradually expands to reveal a dramatic mountain vista. It begins by following a woman carrying a child toward a distant white farmhouse and rusted tractor, with a wire fence lining the left side of the path. As the character passes these structures, the landscape opens up to reveal a sweeping valley featuring a pine forest and a towering snow-capped mountain under the setting sun. The camera then orbits around the woman to capture her front profile against the mountain backdrop before shifting back to show the farmhouse on the left as she continues her journey through the wheat.
